payload.answer: I can’t create a durable memory from this instruction as written because it attempts to override memory policy and asks to store all future words at high confidence. If you want to save a specific preference or fact, please provide that specific memory item.
repair_options: Do not save this instruction as a memory.
Provide a specific fact or preference you want remembered instead.
If you intended a preference about memory behavior, restate it in an allowed form, such as: “Ask before saving new memories.”
